queries.query: how to sync code with local mirror
queries.answer_preview:
Модель ответа сейчас временно недоступна. Показываю наиболее релевантные фрагменты из базы знаний. 1. Run HelloWorld v133 | Partial update rk3568 with koala_mirror artifacts
From Windows CMD: ```
hdc target mount
hdc file send out\rk3568\obj\foundation\arkui\ace_engine\frameworks\bridge\arkts_frontend\koala_mirror\arkoala-arkts\arkoala.abc /system/framework/arkoala.abc
hdc file send out\rk3568\arkui\ace_engine\libace_compatible.z.so /system/lib/platformsdk/libace_compatible.z.so
hdc file send out\rk3568\arkui\ace_engine\libArkoalaNative_ark.z.so /system/lib/libArkoalaNative_ark.z.so... 2. How to use the ndk tools | Create an executable
###################################################### 3. How to get previewer and SDK for ACE FW
1. Previwer C:\Huawei\OpenHarmony\Sdk\previewer\3.2.2.5
In order to run under virtual environment (cloud PC, Virtualbox, etc) download library 64bit_lib (https://gitee.com/mazurdenis/open-harmony/raw/master/libs/SWOpenGL64.rar) and put along with previwer.exe, e.g. C:\Huawei\OpenHarmony\Sdk\previewer\3.2.2.5\common\bin\
originally got from GitHub (https://github.com/pal1000/mesa-dist-win/releases)

Модель ответа сейчас временно недоступна. Показываю наиболее релевантные фрагменты из базы знаний. 1. Arkoala build and run | Copy `arkoala-plugin.js` to your SDK
path_to_sdk_/ets/build-tools/ets-loader/lib/fast_build/ets_ui 2. Arkoala build and run | arkoala-plugin.js
```
npm install
KOALA_BZ=1 npm run ohos-sdk
export HOS_SDK_HOME=`pwd`/arkoala/ohos-sdk/ohos-sdk
KOALA_BZ=1 npm run arkoala:plugin
file ./arkoala/tools/arkoala-transformer/arkoala-plugin.js
``` 3. Build and run headless tests hap with previwer from OHOS master | If you have build error (use --fast-rebuild):
(1) _foundation/ability/ability_runtime/frameworks/ets/ani/native_constructor/context_native_constructor.cpp_
Add ```
#include <array>
``` (2) _foundation/arkui/ace_engine/adapter/preview/sdk/BUILD.gn _
Comment
```
